items.title: Israelis war-weary but most oppose Iran ceasefire, poll suggests
items.dek: The vast majority did not believe Hezbollah or Iran had been severely weakened by weeks of Israeli and US attacks, according to the poll.
items.body: The vast majority did not believe Hezbollah or Iran had been severely weakened by weeks of Israeli and US attacks, according to the poll.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US drivers head to Native American lands for cheaper gas
items.dek: Some of the cheapest fuel in the country can be found on tribal land due to tax exemptions.
items.body: Some of the cheapest fuel in the country can be found on tribal land due to tax exemptions.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Hungarian voters celebrate 'much-needed' change
items.dek: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule is over, defeated by 45-year-old ex-party insider Péter Magyar.
items.body: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule is over, defeated by 45-year-old ex-party insider Péter Magyar.
items.author: IriLine Desk
